name: corpuswire-vscode
description: Enhance prompts and index VS Code workspaces with CorpusWire remote services.

corpuswire.baseUrl.description: Compatibility fallback URL used when serviceDefaults.url and service-specific URLs are unset.

corpuswire.userConfigPath.description: Optional path to a user-level JSON config file. Defaults to ~/.config/corpuswire/vscode-extension.json or ~/.corpuswire/vscode-extension.json.

corpuswire.serviceDefaults.url.description: Default remote service base URL shared by indexer, enhancer, and semantic search when a service-specific URL is unset.

corpuswire.serviceDefaults.apiKey.markdownDescription: Default API key shared by remote services. When apiKeyHeader is `Authorization`, the extension sends it as `Bearer <key>`.

corpuswire.serviceDefaults.apiKeyHeader.description: Default header name used for API key authentication.

corpuswire.serviceDefaults.basicAuth.description: Default Basic Auth credentials in username:password form for remote services.

corpuswire.serviceDefaults.headers.description: Default HTTP headers sent to remote services.

corpuswire.services.indexer.url.description: Remote indexer service base URL. Inherits serviceDefaults.url when unset.

corpuswire.services.indexer.apiKey.description: API key for the remote indexer service. Inherits serviceDefaults.apiKey when unset.

corpuswire.services.indexer.apiKeyHeader.description: Header name used for the remote indexer API key. Inherits serviceDefaults.apiKeyHeader when unset.

corpuswire.services.indexer.basicAuth.description: Basic Auth credentials for the remote indexer service. Inherits serviceDefaults.basicAuth when unset.

corpuswire.services.indexer.headers.description: Additional HTTP headers sent to the remote indexer service.

corpuswire.services.enhancer.url.description: Remote prompt enhancer service base URL. Inherits serviceDefaults.url when unset.

corpuswire.services.enhancer.apiKey.description: API key for the remote prompt enhancer service. Inherits serviceDefaults.apiKey when unset.

corpuswire.services.enhancer.apiKeyHeade.description: Header name used for the remote prompt enhancer API key. Inherits serviceDefaults.apiKeyHeader when unset.

corpuswire.services.enhancer.basicAuth.description: Basic Auth credentials for the remote prompt enhancer service. Inherits serviceDefaults.basicAuth when unset.

corpuswire.services.enhancer.headers.description: Additional HTTP headers sent to the remote prompt enhancer service.

corpuswire.services.semanticSearch.url.description: Remote semantic search service base URL. Inherits serviceDefaults.url when unset.

corpuswire.services.semanticSearch.apiKe.description: API key for the remote semantic search service. Inherits serviceDefaults.apiKey when unset.
Header name used for the remote semantic search API key. Inherits serviceDefaults.apiKeyHeader when unset.

corpuswire.services.semanticSearch.basic.description: Basic Auth credentials for the remote semantic search service. Inherits serviceDefaults.basicAuth when unset.

corpuswire.services.semanticSearch.heade.description: Additional HTTP headers sent to the remote semantic search service.

corpuswire.repoPath.description: Repository path to use for retrieval. Leave empty to use the first VS Code workspace folder. Supports ${workspaceFolder}.

corpuswire.topK.description: Number of retrieval chunks to request from CorpusWire.

corpuswire.outputMode.description: Prompt style requested from the enhancement backend.

corpuswire.localOnly.description: Use the backend's deterministic local prompt rewrite instead of first trying the configured generation provider.

corpuswire.remoteIndexing.enabled.description: Enable remote-first indexing by uploading workspace file contents over the CorpusWire HTTPS API.

corpuswire.remoteIndexing.autoWatch.description: Watch workspace file changes and send incremental remote indexing updates.

corpuswire.remoteIndexing.workspaceId.description: Stable remote workspace identifier. Empty uses the first workspace folder URI.

corpuswire.remoteIndexing.maxConcurrentU.description: Maximum concurrent remote upload batches requested by the extension.

corpuswire.remoteIndexing.batchBytes.description: Target maximum file bytes to include in one remote indexing batch.
